title: Mieruko-chan
sourceNotes: Single-cour 2021 TV anime (12 eps) adapting Tomoki Izumi's ongoing horror-comedy manga (Kadokawa). The anime covers manga volumes 1-3, roughly chapters 1-23; the author has said readers should resume at chapter 24. Manga is RELEASING (~ch. 71 / 14 volumes as of mid-2026 per web sources). The series is loosely structured with episodic spirit encounters, so episode-to-chapter groupings follow the volume boundaries and are approximate. No theatrical films.

mappings.arc: Awakening (Volume 1: Miko starts seeing spirits, befriends Hana Yurikawa)
Mountain God & New Encounters (Volume 2: shrine deity, fortune teller, Yulia)
Zen & the Cats (Volume 3: Zen Touno and the cat-killer resolution)
